steps.title: Find the defining challenge
steps.content: The passage directly identifies the obstacle: the cave's low ceiling afforded no position from which to view the glyphs (which are ten feet wide) in their entirety.

steps.title: Pick the choice that identifies the challenge
steps.content:
Choice D correctly identifies what the passage describes as the challenge.

The other choices mention obstacles not discussed in the text or contradict what happened.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
